basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitc.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc in Chemistry with at least 80% marks (or 8.0 CGPA in 10 point scale)
qualification.details: MSc in Chemistry with at least 80% marks (or 8.0 CGPA in 10 point scale)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Associate-I position at NIT Calicut is 14th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc in Chemistry with a minimum of 80% marks or an 8.0 CGPA on a 10-point scale.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Associate-I position is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 31,000 plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Calicut Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line clearly states the post applied for.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate-I post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Calicut located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Calicut is located in Calicut, Kerala.
